---
title: "SectionedELL"
generated: true
description: "Bucketed-row ELL."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse.ell_sectioned`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SectionedELL -->
```python
class SectionedELL
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:SectionedELL -->
Bucketed-row ELL.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SectionedELL.tree_flatten -->
```python
tree_flatten() -> Tuple[Tuple[Tuple[ELL, ...], Tuple[NDArray[Any], ...]], Tuple[int, int, Any]]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Flatten into pytree children and static auxiliary data.

The per-bucket [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd) pytrees carry the
differentiable `values` leaves; the row-group index arrays ride along
as leaves (integer -> zero/float0 cotangent).  The *number* of buckets
is structural (encoded in the treedef), so the static Python dispatch
loop length in the matmul is preserved across a trace.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SectionedELL.tree_unflatten -->
```python
tree_unflatten(aux: Tuple[int, int, Any], children: Tuple[Tuple[ELL, ...], Tuple[NDArray[Any], ...]]) -> 'SectionedELL'
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SectionedELL.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(sections: Tuple[ELL, ...], row_groups: Tuple[NDArray[Any], ...], n_rows: int, n_cols: int, identity: Any = None) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
